description_long: This is a grand Buddhist temple with a steeply pitched, multi-tiered gable roof covered in orange tiles and adorned with ornate golden finials at each corner. The exterior walls are white and feature intricately carved reliefs and decorative window frames, while the roof edges are lined with elaborate gold trim and mythological motifs. The main entrance is accessed by a wide staircase flanked by guardian statues and columns, leading to a portico with richly decorated pediments and golden embellishments. The temple sits on a raised blue-tiled platform, which extends around the structure and provides space for ceremonial activities. The side facades display a series of evenly spaced windows and decorative pilasters, contributing to the symmetrical and harmonious appearance. Overall, the temple exudes a sense of reverence and grandeur, characteristic of traditional Thai Buddhist architecture.
description: A grand Thai Buddhist temple with an ornate orange-tiled gable roof, white carved walls, and a richly decorated entrance atop a blue-tiled platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, guardian statues, and the highly ornate entrance with golden trim and pediment details.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, orange-tiled gable roof, white walls with decorative windows, and the extended blue-tiled platform.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible stairs and columns, but less ornamentation and fewer statues at the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the length of the roof, window arrangement, and platform details.
attribute_ornamentation: dense gold trim, intricate floral and mythological reliefs, decorative window frames, ornate pediments, guardian statues
attribute_entrance_design: Wide staircase leading to a columned portico, flanked by guardian statues, with a richly decorated triangular pediment and gold embellishments framing the main doorway
